payload.criterion: Push-fanout (two-remote) addressed: design spec'd either explicit dependency on Phase 1 (agent-push-to-main) landing, OR a per-design policy that avoids doubling — candidates: act remote is no-remote by default for solo workflows; act sync is per-session not per-close; push happens via .git/hooks/post-commit in the act repo (outside agent tool surface). Probably some combination.
